name: developer-portal
description: Backstage developer portal and code-server (VS Code in browser). Provides service catalog, developer self-service, and the primary interface for Claude Code agents. Also delivers SonarQube and ReportPortal for code quality and test result history.
sprintGoal: Ship the Backstage developer portal Helm chart and SonarQube/ReportPortal charts, with a GGE G5 ANDON fix ensuring future sprint planning never stalls.

stories.title: ANDON: Restore broken GGE — Planning pipeline always has a pending increment to execute
stories.description: Golden Goose Egg G5 indicator is failing. Indicator type: gate_passing. Restore it immediately. Rationale: The plan ceremony cannot run without a pending increment in manifest.json. When all increments complete, the machine stalls silently — no error, no alert, just nothing to plan. This egg catches that stall state immediately. First triggered when increment 9 completed with no successor increment defined.
acceptanceCriteria: GGE G5 indicator passes in orient
stories.readinessNote: Missing testPlan field — pulled into sprint-11 remediation as priority-0 ANDON override. Implementer should run: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('prd/manifest.json')); pending=[i for i in m.get('increments',[]) if i.get('status')=='pending']; print(len(pending), 'pending')" to verify GGE G5 passes after fix.

stories.title: Helm chart: Backstage developer portal
stories.description: Create charts/backstage/ using a custom Dockerfile-based deployment (backstage/backstage base image). Pre-configure plugins: GitLab catalog, Kubernetes plugin, ArgoCD plugin, TechDocs (stored on ceph-bucket). Keycloak OIDC auth. Ingress at backstage.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. Service catalog auto-discovers GitLab repos via catalog-info.yaml. ArgoCD app in argocd-apps/devex/.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/backstage/ deploys Backstage with Keycloak OIDC
GitLab integration configured (reads catalog-info.yaml from repos)
stories.testPlan: Run quality gates: helm lint, shellcheck, kubectl dry-run, verify all acceptanceCriteria.

smart.notes: Not yet SMART-scored. Run smart-check ceremony before pulling into a sprint.

stories.readinessNote: testPlan is generic. Implementer must run: helm lint charts/backstage/; helm template charts/backstage/ | grep PodDisruptionBudget; helm template charts/backstage/ | grep podAntiAffinity; grep replicaCount charts/backstage/values.yaml; kubectl apply --dry-run=client -f argocd-apps/devex/backstage-app.yaml.

stories.title: Helm charts: SonarQube and ReportPortal
stories.description: Create charts/sonarqube/ wrapping sonarqube/sonarqube. PostgreSQL storage via Crossplane. Keycloak OIDC. Ingress at sonar.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. GitLab CI integration documented. Create charts/reportportal/ using reportportal Helm chart. PostgreSQL + Elasticsearch + RabbitMQ dependencies. Keycloak OIDC. Ingress at reports.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. Both in argocd-apps/devex/.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/sonarqube/ with Keycloak OIDC and ceph-block storage
charts/reportportal/ with all dependencies and Keycloak OIDC
GitLab CI integration guide in docs/
stories.testPlan: grep 'sonarqube' vendor/VENDORS.yaml | grep ha_exception; grep -n 'replicaCount' charts/sonarqube/values.yaml; helm lint charts/sonarqube/ charts/reportportal/; helm template charts/sonarqube/ | grep PodDisruptionBudget; helm template charts/reportportal/ | grep PodDisruptionBudget.
reviewNotes: [Review 1] HA gate AC failed: 'Default replicaCount in values.yaml is >= 2' (CLAUDE.md quality gate #12). Command: grep -n 'replicaCount' charts/sonarqube/values.yaml — Output: '33: replicaCount: 1' (nested under sonarqube: subchart key). helm template charts/sonarqube/ | grep 'replicas:' — Output: 'replicas: 1' (SonarQube pod). SonarQube Community Edition supports only 1 replica. Fix: add ha_exception: true entry in vendor/VENDORS.yaml for sonarqube with ha_exception_reason, AND add top-level replicaCount: 1 with a comment referencing the VENDORS.yaml entry. reportportal chart: replicaCount: 2 — PASS. All other ACs pass.

smart.notes: Not yet SMART-scored. Run smart-check ceremony before pulling into a sprint.

stories.returnedReason: SonarQube CE is single-instance; ha_exception entry must be added to vendor/VENDORS.yaml and replicaCount: 1 documented at chart top-level before HA gate #12 will pass.
stories.readinessNote: Re-opened with specific fix: (1) add ha_exception: true with ha_exception_reason to vendor/VENDORS.yaml for sonarqube; (2) add top-level replicaCount: 1 with a comment referencing the VENDORS.yaml exception to charts/sonarqube/values.yaml. testPlan updated to verify these specifically.
